message:
fix(mvcc): update concurrent handle borrow patterns for shared Arc<Mutex> API

Adjust connection.rs and begin_concurrent.rs call sites to work with
the new per-handle Arc<Mutex<ConcurrentHandle>> pattern: use explicit
lock() instead of direct field access, and pass &mut references where
the updated concurrent_write_page signature requires them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
